OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update existing data in OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: The confidence level of data produced by this connector.

INTEL471_PROXY.description: Optional proxy URL for Intel 471 API requests.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_INDICATORS.description: The interval in minutes between each run of the indicators stream.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_INDICATORS.description: The initial history in hours for the indicators stream.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_YARA.description: The interval in minutes between each run of the YARA stream.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_YARA.description: The initial history in hours for the YARA stream.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_CVES.description: The interval in minutes between each run of the CVEs stream.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_CVES.description: The initial history in hours for the CVEs stream.

INTEL471_INTERVAL_IOCS.description: The interval in minutes between each run of the IOCs stream.

INTEL471_INITIAL_HISTORY_IOCS.description: The initial history in hours for the IOCs stream.
